tasks.label: Go out to the club with the friend group

memory.summary: Friends are inviting me to Echo, but my midterm is tomorrow and I only have 60% of my review done. Going out now would mean less study time.
Mina declined Echo, confirming I should prioritize my midterm review. My energy and sleep debt still require caution while studying.
I missed the club night, but I made significant study progress on my midterm review. My energy and sleep debt remain high, so I must continue focusing on my exams tonight.
Good sleep restored my energy, but I must still prioritize my midterm review since only 60% is done.
Midterm review is now complete. I can relax slightly but must monitor energy levels before tomorrow's exam.
I joined the club and was welcomed, but my midterm is now active. Since I finished reviewing, I should enjoy the social moment before the exam.
